title: Vendor c/image after merging c/image blob-info-caching PR on top of contents caching
body:
This is #1193 + the changes necessary to make it work with `pkg/blobcache`.

NOTE: This is a _very minimal_ adaptation to the API changes; `BlobCache` could benefit much more, see comments in #1149 .

(Includes a few cleanup commits that are not strictly necessary; see the commit messages for details.)

comments.body:
@nalind @vrothberg PTAL
It LGTM, but you guys are probably better then me at this.
LGTM but as I am new to this code, I would love @nalind to have another look
(Note that this is currently vendoring in an unmerged c/image PR.)
@mtrmac How close is the c/image PR to getting merged?

As of right now, it needs:
- API documentation
- Reviews
- Logging on cache DB use failures
- Test cases for corner cases using the cache DB

with at least the first two items blocking.
The change looks fine to me, but we probably shouldn't merge until @mtrmac vendors from upstream rather than is private repo unnless there's a catch-22 in the lurking.
Yes agree, we need the containers/image merged.
@mtrmac Now that the patch is merged in containers image, can you rebase this so we can get it merged?

:pushpin: Commit 2142067 has been approved by `rhatdan`
